Core Features

One app.
Every act of worship.

AI Reflections

Quranic-based spiritual reflections generated instantly by advanced AI, exclusively trained on authenticated Islamic scholarship and Tafsir. Deeply personal, profoundly accurate.

Powered by Advanced LLM

Qur'ān Reader

Professional 604-page reader with 5 daily prayer-aligned sessions. Auto-saves every 5 seconds.

Featured Name

Every 1080px high-res flyer beautifully embeds your name in studio-grade typography. Uniquely yours.

Streak Tracking

Build daily consistency with beautiful visual accountability. Every reflection matters.

One-Tap Share

Instantly export studio-quality flyers to WhatsApp, Instagram, and X — with your name perfectly placed.

Qur'ān Reader

Structured reading,
beautifully designed.

A meticulously crafted interface that transforms daily reading into a seamless, focus-driven spiritual habit.

01
29-Day Structure
Complete all 604 pages with balanced daily assignments — perfect, pressure-free progression.
02
5 Prayer-Aligned Phases
Read with Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha — each session optimized for 10 focused minutes.
03
Auto-Save Every 5s
Your position syncs silently. Resume exactly where you left off, on any device, any time.

Days 1–20 (400 pg)Days 21–29 (204 pg)

Est. daily time~50 min

Why RamadanBot

Built for focus.
Engineered for peace.

Every design decision prioritizes your spiritual clarity. Nothing superfluous. Everything intentional.

01
Authentically Islamic
Grounded in Quranic verses and Tafsir-backed teachings — zero generic AI hallucinations that misrepresent the faith.
02
Absolute Privacy
Just your name and PIN. Zero tracking, zero ads, zero data sold. Your spiritual journey belongs only to you.
03
Always Free
Full unlimited access to every feature. No tiers, no paywalls, no dark patterns — built purely for the ummah.
04
Community Driven
Share your reflections and inspire your circle. Build collective accountability and spiritual momentum.
05
Premium Export
Studio-quality 1080px typographic flyers with your name elegantly embedded — ready for any social platform.
06
PWA Ready
Install to your home screen in one tap. Works offline, syncs seamlessly — feels exactly like a native app.
FAQ

Common questions.

How does the AI generate reflections?
We leverage advanced LLMs exclusively prompted with authenticated Islamic knowledge and Tafsir. Profoundly accurate reflections — no generic content, no fabrication.
Can I preview the flyer before sharing?
Absolutely. The studio preview renders exactly how your 1080px flyer will export. Regenerate infinitely until it resonates — at zero cost.
How do I install RamadanBot as an app?
Open RamadanBot in Safari or Chrome, tap "Share", then "Add to Home Screen". It launches and behaves identically to a native app.
Is my personal data secure?
We collect zero sensitive data. Only your display name is stored locally or via encrypted sync. Privacy is our architectural foundation, not an afterthought.
Are there any hidden costs?
RamadanBot is 100% free. Unlimited reflections, unlimited Qur'ān reading, premium exports — zero cost, forever.
